shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into story scene
assets.alt: Hatch seated at two editor setups showing the plugin path versus the full fork path.
assets.caption: Hatch seated at two editor setups showing the plugin path versus the full fork path.
assets.prompt: Cursor's Fork | hero: Hatch mascot (the HackProduct robot with graduation cap and growth arrow) seated at a split workstation: one side shows a plugin panel inside a generic editor frame (constrained, boxed in), the other side shows a full open editor canvas with Hatch's own tools freely arranged. Cap tilted thoughtfully. Cream background, no speech bubbles. Watermark: "HackProduct" wordmark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 2400×1350. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
assets.crop_notes: Center-cover crop checked against role safe zone.
qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.
Watermark applied in post-processing.
No exact logos, fake screenshots, real person likenesses, or implied endorsement.

assets.alt: Hatch gesturing toward a branching diagram showing the plugin ceiling versus the fork's open horizon.
assets.caption: Hatch gesturing toward a branching diagram showing the plugin ceiling versus the fork's open horizon.
assets.prompt: Cursor's Fork | hatch-narrator: Hatch in narrator pose standing beside a large architectural diagram on a whiteboard: one branch labeled "Plugin" ends at a ceiling with a wall, the other branch labeled "Fork" opens into open sky. Cream background, no text visible in image. Hatch's gesture points toward the open branch. Aspect 1600×1600. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.

assets.alt: Hatch inside a full editor environment showing the features only possible by owning the substrate.
assets.caption: Hatch inside a full editor environment showing the features only possible by owning the substrate.
assets.prompt: Cursor's Fork | failure-mechanism: Hatch in thinking pose standing inside a rendered code editor view — diff panels, inline Cmd+K input, multi-file context bars all visible around it. The editor is the whole environment, not a box within a box. Hatch looks comfortable, like it lives here. Cream background. Aspect 1800×1200. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression.
